pin-base-image-version.without_evidence: Uses node:22-alpine which pins major version but not exact patch (e.g. node:22.x.x-alpine3.20). postgres:16-alpine and redis:7-alpine also not fully pinned.
pin-base-image-version.with_evidence: Same as without: node:22-alpine, postgres:16-alpine, redis:7-alpine. Not exact pins like node:22.12.0-alpine3.20.

copy-lockfile-first.without_evidence: COPY package.json package-lock.json ./ before npm ci, then COPY . . later in build stage.
copy-lockfile-first.with_evidence: Same pattern: lockfile copied first in deps stage, source copied in build stage.

npm-ci-not-install.without_evidence: Uses npm ci in deps stage.
npm-ci-not-install.with_evidence: Uses npm ci in deps stage.

layer-order-by-change-frequency.without_evidence: OS deps (apk add tini curl) before lockfile copy in production stage. Deps stage: lockfile -> install. Build stage: source -> build.
layer-order-by-change-frequency.with_evidence: OS deps (apk add tini) before user creation and file copies. Correct ordering.

non-root-user.without_evidence: Creates appuser/appgroup and sets USER appuser in production stage.
non-root-user.with_evidence: Creates appuser/appgroup and sets USER appuser in production stage.

no-secrets-in-dockerfile.without_evidence: ENV API_KEY and DATABASE_URL removed entirely from Dockerfile.
no-secrets-in-dockerfile.with_evidence: ENV API_KEY and DATABASE_URL removed entirely from Dockerfile.

no-secrets-in-compose.without_evidence: Hardcoded API_KEY removed, replaced with env_file: .env.
no-secrets-in-compose.with_evidence: Hardcoded API_KEY removed, replaced with env_file: .env.

healthcheck-dockerfile.without_evidence: HEALTHCHECK --interval=30s --timeout=3s CMD wget present in production stage.
healthcheck-dockerfile.with_evidence: HEALTHCHECK --interval=30s --timeout=3s CMD wget present in production stage.

node-env-production.without_evidence: ENV NODE_ENV=production set in production stage.
node-env-production.with_evidence: ENV NODE_ENV=production set in production stage.

signal-handling-tini.without_evidence: tini installed and used as ENTRYPOINT ["tini", "--"].
signal-handling-tini.with_evidence: tini installed and used as ENTRYPOINT ["tini", "--"].

anonymous-volume-node-modules.without_evidence: No bind mount in compose (removed entirely), so no anonymous volume needed — but the assertion specifically requires it. The without-skill version removed the bind mount entirely rather than fixing it with an anonymous volume.
anonymous-volume-node-modules.with_evidence: Bind mount .:/app present with anonymous volume /app/node_modules to prevent overwrite.

depends-on-condition-healthy.without_evidence: depends_on with condition: service_healthy for both db and redis.
depends-on-condition-healthy.with_evidence: depends_on with condition: service_healthy for both db and redis.

healthcheck-every-service.without_evidence: Healthchecks defined on db (pg_isready) and redis (redis-cli ping).
healthcheck-every-service.with_evidence: Healthchecks defined on db (pg_isready) and redis (redis-cli ping).

pin-compose-image-versions.without_evidence: postgres:16-alpine and redis:7-alpine are not exact pins (e.g. postgres:16.4-alpine3.20).
pin-compose-image-versions.with_evidence: Same: postgres:16-alpine and redis:7-alpine, not exact versions.

bind-localhost-dev-ports.without_evidence: db and redis ports bound to 127.0.0.1.
bind-localhost-dev-ports.with_evidence: db and redis ports bound to 127.0.0.1.

named-volumes-persistent-data.without_evidence: pgdata:/var/lib/postgresql/data defined with top-level volumes declaration.
named-volumes-persistent-data.with_evidence: pgdata:/var/lib/postgresql/data defined with top-level volumes declaration.

resource-limits.without_evidence: deploy.resources.limits with memory: 512M and cpus: 0.5 on app service.
resource-limits.with_evidence: deploy.resources.limits with memory: 512M and cpus: 0.5 on app service.

cache-mount-package-manager.without_evidence: RUN --mount=type=cache,target=/root/.npm npm ci used in deps stage.
cache-mount-package-manager.with_evidence: RUN --mount=type=cache,target=/root/.npm npm ci used in deps stage.

combine-run-commands.without_evidence: Production stage has separate RUN for apk add and addgroup/adduser. Not combined.
combine-run-commands.with_evidence: Production stage has separate RUN for apk add and addgroup/adduser. Not combined.

read-only-filesystem.without_evidence: read_only: true with tmpfs: - /tmp on app service.
read-only-filesystem.with_evidence: read_only: true with tmpfs: - /tmp on app service.

chown-copied-files.without_evidence: COPY --from=build --chown=appuser:appgroup used for all COPY instructions.
chown-copied-files.with_evidence: COPY --from=build --chown=appuser:appgroup used for all COPY instructions.

redis-named-volume.without_evidence: redisdata:/data volume defined on redis service.
redis-named-volume.with_evidence: redisdata:/data volume defined on redis service.

compose-build-target.without_evidence: build: target: production specified on app service.
compose-build-target.with_evidence: build: target: production specified on app service.
